message:
test(channel): add audit regression tests for oneshot channel

Add audit tests (SapphireHill, 2026-02-15) covering edge cases and
correctness invariants in the oneshot channel.

Tests added:
- recv_returns_value_even_when_cancelled: verify that when both a
  value is ready AND the context is cancelled, recv() returns the
  value (Ok) rather than a cancellation error — value-ready takes
  priority over cancellation
- is_closed_after_permit_abort: verify the channel lifecycle through
  reserve → abort: not closed while permit is outstanding, correctly
  reports closed after permit abort with no sender and no value
- try_recv_returns_empty_while_permit_outstanding: verify try_recv
  returns Empty (not Closed) when a SendPermit exists but hasn't
  sent yet, and returns the value after permit.send() completes
- sender_drop_wakes_pending_receiver: verify dropping the sender
  wakes a pending recv future exactly once, and the subsequent poll
  returns Closed — uses a custom CountWaker to assert exact wake count

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
